package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerProfilingBenchmarkingOptimizationCommentWithoutBenchmark() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_optimization_comment_without_benchmark"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag performance-claim comments that lack benchmark, profile, or trace evidence."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
